description_long: This is a pair of low-top sneakers featuring a tan suede-like material on the toe box and midsection, contrasted by a dark camouflage pattern on the heel and collar. The shoes have black laces threaded through standard eyelets and a white rubber sole with a textured edge for grip. A yellow circular emblem is visible on the outer heel, and a yellow rectangular logo patch is present on the tongue. The interior appears padded for comfort, and the overall construction suggests durability suitable for urban environments. The shoes are symmetrical, with subtle stitching details and a reinforced toe cap. The design blends casual streetwear aesthetics with practical elements for everyday use.
description: A pair of tan and camouflage low-top sneakers with black laces, white rubber soles, and yellow logo accents. The shoes feature a mix of suede-like and textile materials, designed for urban wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tan toe box, black laces, and yellow logo patches on the tongues.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the camouflage heel, yellow emblem, and white sole with visible stitching.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the camouflage pattern on the heel and the white heel tabs.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the camouflage heel, yellow emblem, and tan midsection.
attribute_logo: yellow rectangular patch on tongue, yellow circular emblem on outer heel
